title: pyrus adeana
side_effects: Pyrus adeana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of essential oils. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives and itching. Furthermore, improper preparation or dosage of Pyrus adeana may cause cardiovascular issues, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. In severe cases, using the plant inappropriately may even lead to kidney or liver damage.
